updates.prompt: Keep writing the story and it should have fight scenes for player to play and calm scenes that make u feel like ur being watched, feel liminal or eerie, or peaceful and dream like and vey lucid or psychedelic and mystical or mysterious. And should have dialogue branches and storylines and replayability and intrude more of the characters from the books and game... U can also throw des out the luxury suitw mdickie style he can get injured or die but also can survive and keep fighting etc
updates.action_taken: Expanded 'God Within' Act 2 zones in GodWithinZoneTriggers with Liminal/Surreal locations: Catwalks (Sombra Negra), Void Dream (Solaris Justice), Tape Archive (Cain Elias - Paranoia Remix), Hall of Mirrors (Toma Ishikawa/Kage - Oni Remix), Shower Block (Adrian Vess/Mortus - Drowned Remix), Arena Roof (Stick Up - Awakened Remix), Sub-Basement (Atlas Vance - Burned Kingdom Remix), and VIP Skybox (Desmond Okafor/Viper - Hollow Ego Remix). Added 'throwCharacterFromHeight' function in GodWithinCampaign to support MDickie-style destructive outcomes for falling off high points like the VIP Skybox, allowing survival or permanent incapacitation based on the drop.
